description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet or display shelf with a central large black panel flanked by two vertical columns of smaller square compartments, each outlined with a light-colored grid. The frame is constructed from a wood material with a visible grain pattern, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The central section appears to be a solid or opaque panel, possibly for display or as a chalkboard, while the side compartments are likely open or covered with glass or another transparent material. The overall design is symmetrical, with the side compartments mirroring each other. The object is relatively shallow in depth, suggesting it is intended to be mounted on a wall rather than freestanding. There are no visible handles, hinges, or doors, and the compartments are empty.
description: A rectangular wooden cabinet or display shelf with a central black panel and two columns of square compartments, framed in wood with a grid design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central black panel and two columns of square compartments with grid lines.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin, shallow profile of the cabinet or shelf.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, similar to view 0, showing the central black panel and side compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile.
